markercategory.name: disc
markercategory.copy-message: The uL discord link was copied!
markercategory.tip-description: Copy the link to join the ul discord & submit questions, comments, or suggestions!

markercategory.name: web
markercategory.copy: /friend Ohnage.1638
markercategory.copy-message: Chat command to add Ohnage to your friends copied!
markercategory.tip-description: Copy chat command to add Ohnage to your in-game friends list to ask or share directly!

markercategory.name: thanks
markercategory.tip-description:
Big thanks to those who helped make this project what it has become!
• Fataleiga • Mestiak • Feesh • QuitarHero

markercategory.name: tut
markercategory.tip-description:
Enable/Disable the Tutorial located in Queensdale
This is not complete and is currently a work in progress.

markercategory.name: ExtraM
markercategory.tip-description: Enable/Disable the Extra Steps images that are on the left/right of the zones when the map is active.

markercategory.name: dmgtype
markercategory.tip-description:
Select whether you will be leveling as Power or Condition Damage
(This effects the Trading Post messages)

markercategory.name: power
markercategory.tip-description: Select if you plan to level using power damage (recomended)

markercategory.name: condi
markercategory.tip-description: Select if you plan to level using condition damage

markercategory.name: ulhp
markercategory.tip-description: Hero Point Train Created To Help Lead Groups.

markercategory.name: hp_sm
markercategory.tip-description: This Is For A Smaller Group (Under 25) • Less Commune Wait Time (15 Sec) • Only Kill Once

markercategory.name: hp_big
markercategory.tip-description: This Is For A Bigger Group (Over 25) • Longer Commune Wait Time (30 Sec) • Double Kills Are Enabled

markercategory.name: hp_sm
markercategory.tip-description: This Is For A Smaller Group (Under 25) • Less Commune Wait Time (15 Sec) • Only Kill Once

markercategory.name: hp_big
markercategory.tip-description: This Is For A Bigger Group (Over 25) • Longer Commune Wait Time (30 Sec) • Double Kills Are Enabled

markercategory.name: hp_sm
markercategory.tip-description: This Is For A Smaller Group (Under 25) • Less Commune Wait Time (15 Sec) • Only Kill Once

markercategory.name: hp_big
markercategory.tip-description: This Is For A Bigger Group (Over 25) • Longer Commune Wait Time (30 Sec) • Double Kills Are Enabled

markercategory.copy: • [&BM0JAAA=] → [&BOAHAAA=] → [&BMwHAAA=] → [&BE4JAAA=] → [&BJMLAAA=] •
markercategory.copy-message: All Waypoints For Flax Farm copied
markercategory.tip-description: Copy All Waypoints For The Flax Farm So You Can Easly Paste Them Into Chat And Work Through Them.

markercategory.name: copy1
markercategory.tip-description: Copy The Waypoint That Starts This Chest Farm
